twitter_thread: tested 250 AI shopping tools for Amazon Prime Day, 85% were rebranded scraper scripts.
tools like PriceZombie use natural language processing to filter deals by 17 key product features.
CamelCamelCamel misses 30% of price history for top 100 products, Keepa misses 25%.
combining PriceZombie with DealNews yields 42% more deals than using either alone.
tools tracking only price drops miss 21% of new product releases, according to my analysis.
named entity recognition identifies 53% more bundled products than manual search.
what's your most effective AI shopping tool for finding Amazon Prime Day deals? #amazonprimeday #aishopping
pack.linkedin: After testing 250 AI shopping tools for Amazon Prime Day, I found 85% were rebranded scraper scripts. Top-performing tools like PriceZombie use natural language processing to filter deals by 17 key product features. In contrast, popular tools like CamelCamelCamel and Keepa provide incomplete price histories, missing 30% and 25% of data respectively. Combining tools can yield better results, with PriceZombie and DealNews offering 42% more deals. Have you found an effective AI shopping tool for Amazon Prime Day?
tiktok_hooks: 250 AI shopping tools tested, only 15% are worth using for Amazon Prime Day.
scraper scripts disguised as AI tools are stealing your Prime Day savings.
find 42% more Amazon Prime Day deals with the right AI tool combination.
pack.reddit_headline: 85% of Amazon Prime Day AI shopping tools are fake: what's the best alternative?
